factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Spew
uniqueTraits.text: When Retchlings make a recruit action during Grimgut's activation, you may place the new Retchling adjacent to any Retchling placed during this activation.

ultimate.name: Buffet
ultimate.text: This skill may target up to three followers on any hexes within range.

plotSkills.name: New Spew
plotSkills.text: Remove all Retchlings from the battlefield. Then they make five recruit actions.

plotSkills.name: Flu Spew
plotSkills.text: This skill targets each enemy champion and follower unit adjacent to one or more Retchlings. Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Goo Spew
plotSkills.text: This skill targets each enemy champion and follower unit adjacent to one or more Retchlings. Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Roll
clashSkills.text: Grimgut moves up to 3 hexes in a straight line.

clashSkills.name: New Spew
clashSkills.text: Remove all Retchlings from the battlefield. Then they make five recruit actions.

traits.name: Wretched
traits.text: When a Retchling is knocked out, it is worth 0 steps instead of 1.

plotSkills.name: Slip and Slide
plotSkills.text: Gain {move_boon}. Two Retchlings may use this skill in the same activation if they are in different hexes.

clashSkills.name: Slimed
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to three models in one hex. Two Retchlings may use this skill in the same activation if they are in different hexes.
